creator: maciphone2@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #58)

first u-boot-source-patch trials (of course) failed for me tonight, no real surprise,  :-) Ha Ha

O.K., 
here`s a workaround I hope that will work for your test-setup and the bug-reporter`s geekworm-board:

interrupt to get into the u-boot-prompt(e.g. by holding the TAB-key).
--
type exactly following one-liner :
usb stop; boot
(then press Enter)
..... this dirty workaround is ONLY useful for this exact multi-lun-usb-setup when booting from the uSD-slot... it stops the failed controller in u-boot and Rob Crowston`s xhci-driver will restart USB later through another xhci-reset
